title: Hanobe Round Decorative Coffee Tray: Marble Pattern Serving Circle Tray with Handles Coffee Table Trays for Living Room Bar Drink Party Home Kitchen, Black
features: SIMPLE BUT ATTRACTIVE DECOR - This coffee tray for coffee bar designed with gold marbling pattern on inner bottom surface + chic gold top edge, it can provide an elegant background for your vase, picture frame, potted plants, candles, makeups, jewelry or other collections, and add eye-catching visual effects to your room.

PRACTICAL & VERSATILE - Not made of the plastic, it's wood, which makes it much stronger and sturdier than plastic, also without worrying about getting rusty as metal ones or being cheap like plastic ones. And designed with two cutout handles, it’s strong to hold, smooth to be carried, and There is a wide rim so items are not able to slide off.

UPDATE YOUR SPACE - This 12-inch serving trays for party can gather your TV remotes, drink coasters, keys, glasses, etc. so that you can find it in any situation. This round trays home decor will update your space and make your space look organize dand is an ideal place to put your lotions, perfumes and oils on your dresser.

ALL OCCASION - With its graceful look and multiple functions for display and storage, our black or white marble tray will be a pretty accent tray to patio terrace, side table, dining table, nightstand, vanity table etc.except for daily use, it’s also a reliable helper for different occasions, christmas, birthday, wedding, baby shower, housewarming and parties.

WARRANTY - Hanobe always put customer satisfaction in our top-priority position and offer 12 months quality assurance and LIFETIME professional customer service. If you have any problems with our products or services, please feel free to contact us anytime, we’ll get back to you within 24 hours. Buy with confidence!
description: Product Description Previous page Relax in comfort whenever you need Unwind & enjoy life's simple pleasures after work! Serve coffee or beverages easy! Curate beauty, effortlessly Greet guests with grace. Use it for keys or treasures setting a stylish welcoming tone for your home First impressions, beautifully made Minimalist style fits right into your living room, display plants or candles and also store remotes! Next page 1 Rest corner 2 Entryway Welcome 3 Everyday Decor Display Is this tray heavy? What material is it made of? Not at all! The Hanobe decorative tray is quite lightweight, weighing approximately 0.99 pounds. It's easy to move wherever you like. The decorative tray is designed with golden marble patterns and made of textured engineered wood. Can this tray be used outdoors? No, we don't recommend using this Hanobe decorative tray outdoors. Since it's made of wood, it's best suited for indoor use to help it last longer and look its best. Can it hold candles? Absolutely! With an inner diameter of 11.8 inches, this tray is perfectly sized to beautifully display both individual candle holders and candle holder sets. Your candles will truly create a stunning visual centerpiece on the tray! Is it easy to clean and maintain over time? Caring for your tray is super easy! We recommend simply wiping it down with a dry cloth to keep it looking great. Customers love these!
